summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Interactive Haram Map feature - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/floors returns list of floors (1 floor - Basement)
Backend: GET /api/zones returns all 6 interactive zones
Backend: GET /api/floors/{floor_id}/zones returns zones for specific floor
Backend: GET /api/zones/stats/summary returns correct statistics
Backend: All 6 zones present (Kaaba, Mataf, Men Prayer, Women Prayer, Masaa, King Fahd Expansion)
Backend: Zone percentage calculated correctly based on current_crowd/max_capacity
Backend: Crowd status (normal/moderate/crowded/critical) correctly assigned
Backend: Zone polygon points have valid structure (x,y coordinates 0-100)
Frontend: /haram-map page loads interactive map successfully
Frontend: Basement floor image displays as map background
Frontend: 6 interactive zones rendered with correct colors
Frontend: Clicking on zone shows details sidebar (code, type, status, capacity, occupancy, staff)
Frontend: Zone colors change based on crowd percentage (green <50%, yellow 50-70%, orange 70-85%, red >85%)
Frontend: Overall stats displayed (6 zones, 43,600 crowd, 83,000 max, 52.5% occupancy)
Frontend: Status distribution shown (2 normal, 2 moderate, 2 crowded, 0 critical)
Frontend: Floor selector works correctly
Frontend: Zoom in/out controls work
Frontend: Refresh button works
Frontend: Color legend displayed showing zone types and crowd status
Frontend: /map-management page accessible for admins
Frontend: Floors tab shows floor list with view/edit/delete options
Frontend: Zones tab shows map canvas with drawn zones and zone list
Frontend: Crowd Update tab shows all zones with editable crowd values
15/15 pytest tests passed (100% success rate)
seed_data_creation: Basement floor and 6 zones already seeded by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interactive Haram Map feature fully tested - /haram-map displays interactive map with 6 zones, clicking zones shows details, colors based on crowd percentage, /map-management allows admin to manage floors/zones/crowd data

feature_verification.basement_floor_image: PASS - Floor image displays as background
feature_verification.6_interactive_zones: PASS - All zones rendered (Kaaba, Mataf, Men Prayer, Women Prayer, Masaa, King Fahd Expansion)
feature_verification.zone_click_details: PASS - Clicking zone shows details sidebar
feature_verification.dynamic_colors: PASS - Colors change based on crowd percentage
feature_verification.overall_stats: PASS - Stats show total zones, crowd, capacity, occupancy
feature_verification.api_zones: PASS - GET /api/zones returns zone data with calculated percentages
